_comment: Resolved IMAGE ids for the 2026-07-16 theme-compliance set: cold-fire (hell ice), lava_eye_tree (hell lava), crystal_* (heaven_2 gardens), swamp/rot (hell_2 gardens). Decals/meshes in flora_theme_set_*.json. Ice-zone boulder anchors retagged Variant=ice_rock (7 per layer, 35 total). coldfire_tuft prebaked but unwired (no plant anchors in ice zones yet). pearl_cactus still concept-only.
